content: Hi, I'm Finley Flores, nice to meet you. I'm a financial analyst at Goldman Sachs, and I'm currently living in Salt Lake City, UT.
Hi Finley, nice to meet you too. Salt Lake City is a beautiful place, what do you like to do in your free time?
I love to mountain bike and surf, and I've even started taking up 3D printing as a hobby. It's been a great way to relax and be creative.
3D printing is a unique hobby, Finley. What inspired you to start taking it up?

I've always been interested in technology and design, and 3D printing seems like a great way to combine those interests. I've also been experimenting with home brewing beer, which has been a fun hobby.
Home brewing is a great hobby, Finley. Maybe one day you can brew a special batch for a fundraising event. Do you have any pets of your own?
Actually, I don't have any pets right now, but I do have a friend who has a dog named Max. He's a beautiful animal, and I love spending time with him.
Dogs are wonderful companions, Finley. Maybe one day you'll have a pet of your own. How do you like living in Salt Lake City?
I love it, the mountains are beautiful and the people are really friendly. I've even started taking sci-fi novels as a way to relax and escape reality.
Sci-fi novels are a great way to unwind, Finley. Have you thought about getting involved with any local animal welfare organizations in Salt Lake City?
Actually, I have thought about it, and I'd love to get involved. I've heard that there are some great organizations in Salt Lake City that help animals in need.
That's great to hear, Finley. You could use your skills and resources to make a real difference in the community.
Exactly, I think it would be a great way to give back and use my skills to help others. I've recently bought a house in Salt Lake City and I'm renovating it, so I've been busy with that project.
Renovating a house can be a big project, Finley. But it's exciting to have a new space to make your own. Maybe one day you can have a big party to celebrate the completion of the renovation.
That sounds like a great idea, I'll have to plan something for October 15th, which is the expected completion date of the renovation.
October 15th is a great deadline to work towards, Finley. I'm sure your new house will be beautiful when it's finished.
